summary: Verified iteration_7 fixes: (A) moderation now blocks 15 bomb/threat/extremism phrases with friendly 'Your post was blocked for ...' detail mentioning 'violent extremism or terror promotion' OR 'hate speech, threats or abusive language'; safe lookalikes (bomb diggity, bombed my exam, etc.) still pass. (B) ShareCardModal now shows a live CSS-scaled preview within ~60-70ms (well under the 300ms spec), Download button enabled before rasterization with lazy 'Saving PNG' toast on click. All regression flows verified.
critical_code_review_comments: moderation.py is now ~461 lines with many regex lists; if it grows beyond ~700 lines consider splitting into category modules (terror.py, hate.py, sexual.py).

ShareCardModal.jsx Download relies on ensureRendered() blob cache — confirmed cached on 2nd click. Consider also caching across Instagram/TikTok/NativeShare handlers (already implemented via blob ref).
Frontend safety.js mirror list must stay in sync with backend moderation.py — any future addition to terror regex must update both. Suggest a short comment cross-referencing.
seed_data_creation: test_moderation_v7_terror.py uses a fresh uuid device_id per request; no manual seed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest is the source of truth for moderation: `export $(grep -v '^#' /app/frontend/.env | xargs) && cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/ -v`. Note: must export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL into env before running. ShareCardModal live preview is identified by data-testid='share-card-live-preview' and now appears in <100ms in practice. MiniPlayer persistence must be tested via SPA link click (Home/Topics/Music nav links), NOT page.goto (which forces a full reload and unmounts the provider).
verified_flows: POST /api/posts blocks 15 terror phrases with friendly detail (15/15)
POST /api/posts allows 4 safe lookalikes including 'bomb diggity' and 'bombed my exam' (4/4)
Live preview render time: 66ms (post share) / 62ms (music share)
No 'Rendering pluck card' spinner blocking preview
Download button enabled pre-raster; 'Saving PNG' toast confirmed
Copy link + 5 social share options present in modal
CreatePostModal: typing 'i will bomb that place' triggers unsafe-warning and locks submit with text 'Can't post — content blocked'
MiniPlayer iframe persists across SPA navigation Music -> Home -> Topics
